evals.prompt: Before I design a new project type, show me the Expedait processes that already exist.
evals.expected_output: Lists existing processes so we reuse rather than duplicate.

evals.prompt: Create a new process called 'Lean PRD' with a Definition phase that has a Product Vision card and a PRD card.
evals.expected_output: Looks at existing processes, then builds the new one with a single processes write ops call.

assertions.name: writes-process
assertions.description: Runs processes write to build the process atomically

evals.prompt: Add a 'Data Architect' owner role to the workspace role pool.
evals.expected_output: Creates a new role named Data Architect.
